prestazioni: Engine swap to Toyota-sourced 1NZ-FE (1.5L) with a custom-built turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT1549S turbocharger, HKS Super SQV IV blow-off valve, and Tomei 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold, paired with a Haltech Elite 1500 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping to handle 0.8 bar of boost (stock internals retained for reliability).

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the front-wheel-drive layout, reinforced CV joints from Driveshaft Shop, and a lightweight flywheel from Fidanza to reduce rotational mass and improve throttle response.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (specifically valved for the Trezia's 3NR-FE platform), Whiteline front sway bar (22mm adjustable), and SuperPro poly bushings for the rear trailing arms to eliminate compliance and improve turn-in precision.
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (modified for Trezia G chassis) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, all painted in Subaru WR Blue Pearl (M7Y) with matte black accents for aggressive stance and aero efficiency.

OEM+ headlight and taillight conversion using JDM-spec Trezia LED units (part #84210-20040 for headlights, #81550-20030 for taillights) with Morimoto H11 LED bulbs and smoked lenses for a stealthy yet premium look.

Interior rework featuring Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JDM-spec, part #BZ3-200) with Takata Drift III harnesses, a custom roll cage by AutoPower (bolt-in, 6-point, chromoly steel), and a Nardi Classic steering wheel (350mm, suede) paired with a Works Bell quick-release hub for track-ready ergonomics.
